name: Social Bee
description:
SocialBee streamlines social media management with features like content creation and curation, scheduling, and publishing tools. Users can organize posts, maintain a balanced content mix with category-based scheduling, and track performance with analytics. Its user-friendly interface and automation options make managing social media easy and effective.

Source: G2

Features

  • Helps you craft captions and visuals for every platform 
  • Schedule, publish, and reshare your content across all major social media platforms
  • Has AI capabilities to plan social media strategy and create more content 
  • Streamline your work with its platform integrations like Canva, Giphy, and more 
  • Manage your social media DMs, and content and engage with your audience efficiently
  • Comes with in-built analytical dashboards that help you give an in-depth review of your performance 
  • Collaborate with your teammates easily by inviting them to view and comment on your posts before taking them live

Pros 

  • Easy to use and understand 
  • Also helps with queuing and scheduling content easily 

Cons

  • The Canva editor is a very basic one and does not provide premium features
  • Sometimes it runs into bugs and glitches that are not very easy to fix and take days for the technical team to fix

Pricing 

Starts at $29 Per Month
